data.body: INFRA APPLIED (authorized): ran targeted 'terraform apply' (frontier creds; plan was 4 to add / 0 change / 0 destroy). The 3 missing alarms are now LIVE and wire AlarmActions to the rebar-gerrit-alerts SNS topic: rebar-gerrit-g2p-dispatch-errors, rebar-review-bot-merge-change-errors, rebar-gerrit-mirror-out-of-sync (all INSUFFICIENT_DATA — normal for brand-new alarms until metrics arrive). Gap (b) RESOLVED. Gap (a) PARTIAL: the aws_sns_topic_subscription.alerts_email was (re)created but is PendingConfirmation — the confirmation email to joeoakhart@navapbc.com must be clicked (I cannot access the inbox). Durable fix to stop this recurring (auto-deletes after ~72h unconfirmed): switch the sink to a confirmation-free protocol (Slack via AWS Chatbot / HTTPS / SQS+Lambda) — needs a channel/endpoint choice. Remaining: (1) confirm the email (or pick a confirmation-free sink); (2) add terraform to CI for drift detection.
